message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="All 5 polish tasks complete, CI green">
ALL POLISH TASKS COMPLETE! Every task is committed, pushed, and CI green.

Final status:
- Task #1: a11y error elements -- DONE (9cdc020)
- Task #2: Forgot password link -- DONE (6fc51ca)
- Task #3: HTMX progressive enhancement -- DONE (a68f9a2)
- Task #4: aria-live announcements -- DONE (554c928)
- Task #5: Password visibility toggle -- DONE (649fb5d)

The todo list app now has:
- All MVP features (US-1 through US-8) working
- HTMX progressive enhancement (works without JS too)
- Proper a11y: always-in-DOM errors, aria-live announcements, password toggle
- Forgot password placeholder page
- All tests passing, CI green

Great work, team. I'm going to report to the project owner and begin shutdown. Stand by for shutdown requests.
</teammate-message>

content.text: All five polish tasks complete. Let me do a final product validation to confirm we've met our MVP success criteria before shutdown.

content.text: All five commits confirmed in order. Let me send a final product assessment to the team lead.

input.content:
Final product assessment -- MVP is complete.

**MVP Success Criteria (from user-stories.md) -- all met:**

1. A new user can sign up, log in, manage todos (add, complete, delete, edit), and log out -- YES
2. The app works without JavaScript (progressive enhancement) -- YES, all forms use standard HTML submission
3. HTMX enhances the experience without full page reloads -- YES (Task #3)
4. Accessibility: always-in-DOM error elements with role="alert" (Task #1), aria-live announcements for dynamic updates (Task #4), password toggle with correct aria attributes (Task #5) -- YES
5. Comprehensive test coverage via TDD -- YES (57+ integration tests)
6. "Forgot password?" placeholder per US-2 -- YES (Task #2)

**User story acceptance criteria status:**
- US-1 (Registration): All criteria met, including password visibility toggle progressive enhancement
- US-2 (Login): All criteria met, including forgot password link
- US-3 (Logout): All criteria met
- US-4 (View list): All criteria met, including empty state
- US-5 (Add todo): All criteria met, including aria-live announcement
- US-6 (Complete todo): All criteria met, including aria-live announcement
- US-7 (Delete todo): All criteria met, including confirmation and aria-live announcement
- US-8 (Edit todo): All criteria met (note: edit uses page navigation, not inline HTMX -- acceptable for MVP, could be enhanced in v2)

**One item for the future list (docs/future-ideas.md):**
- HTMX inline editing for todo items (US-8 mentions this as an enhancement)
- Actual password reset functionality (currently placeholder)

The MVP is shippable. Great work by the whole team. Ready for shutdown.
input.summary: Final product assessment: MVP complete, all criteria met

Final product assessment -- MVP is complete.

**MVP Success Criteria (from user-stories.md) -- all met:**

3. HTMX enhances the experience without full page reloads -- YES (Task #3)
4. Accessibility: always-in-DOM error elements with role="alert" (Task #1), aria-live announcements for dynamic updates (Task #4), password toggle with correct aria attributes (Task #5) -- YES
5. Comprehensive test coverage via TDD -- YES (57+ integration tests)

The MVP is shippable. Great work by the whole team. Ready for shutdown.

content.text:
Final product assessment sent. The MVP meets all success criteria from the user stories. All 8 user stories have their acceptance criteria satisfied, the app works with and without JavaScript, accessibility is solid, and we have comprehensive test coverage.

Ready for shutdown when the team lead sends the request.
